message:
fix: exclude localhost traffic from GA4 error monitor (#4643)

The GA4 error monitor was creating issues for Vite HMR errors from
localhost dev servers (1,699 "send was called before connect" errors
today — all from localhost, zero from production). Add hostname filter
to both GA4 queries so only console.kubestellar.io errors trigger
issue creation.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
